narratives.full_description:
First Night Special Community Event in Philharmiona

Lulling Your Anxiety
Minimalistic Music Jam 
 
 Hey hosq community, 
 It’s been a while since we reached out.
We’ve been deep in planning, planning, planning: building new projects and opportunities for you. 
 But we realized that before all, we simply want to meet, breathe in and create a calm space for us. 
 So this is a very spontaneous invitation. Very last minute.
The world seems to be getting crazier by the day, and we thought to pause it together for a moment. 
 We invite you to a special gathering “Lulling Your Anxiety.” 
 A small night to slow down, listen, and create a temporary reality that feels safe. 
 
 Thursday March 12th 
 Doors open — 22:30
Music starts — 23:00
Music ends — 01:00 
 
 At the State Philharmonia of Armenia (Library), Abovyan 2 
 
 Music curator:
Dima Ustinov 
 Musicians:
Dima Ustinov
Andriesh Gandrabur
Lusine MLKE-Galstyan
Maria Aristakesyan
…and many more hosq people. 
 
 This event is not public: it’s for our community.
But the community is open, so feel free to bring friends  and friends of friends. 
 Come with an open heart.
And maybe with a bottle of wine. 
 
 See you! 
 hosq team
